thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy has provided CIF and DDP quotations for Diethyl Phthalate to the customer, Sebastiano. The customer requested a price reduction, and after discussions, multiple purchase orders (PO 638, PO 639, PO 640) were confirmed by Elchemy. The customer has amended the POs as requested.
open_items: Elchemy to send Proforma Invoices for PO 638, PO 639, and PO 640
Elchemy to confirm the dispatch planning details after Proforma Invoice acceptance

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy has been in discussions with LR Industries regarding a quotation for Benzaldehyde. After several exchanges, Elchemy provided a revised price of EUR 1.87/Kg CIF Augusta, but LR Industries is seeking a lower price of EUR 1.79 to finalize the order.
open_items: LR Industries is awaiting a response from Elchemy regarding the price adjustment to EUR 1.79.
Elchemy is considering the request for a lower price and has yet to confirm if they can meet it.

thread_summaries.summary: Apurva Arora from Elchemy has informed the customer that they will be out of the office and that their response will be delayed.
Apurva Arora from Elchemy informed the customer that they will be out of the office and that their response will be delayed. No specific products or commitments were discussed.

Elchemy discussed two order opportunities for Benzaldehyde and Diethyl Phthalate with the customer, including specific quantities and delivery dates. Revised price offers were shared, and feedback is requested to proceed further.
open_items: Customer to provide feedback on revised price offers

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy followed up with Sebastiano regarding his upcoming requirements for various specialty chemicals, including Diethyl Phthalate, Benzaldehyde, and Benzyl Acetate. They are ready to discuss pricing and stock for these products and are eager to close some business.
open_items: Sebastiano to confirm interest in Diethyl Phthalate, Benzyl Acetate, and Benzaldehyde for the next purchase

thread_summaries.summary: The email thread discusses the shipment of original documents for PO 1231, which is scheduled to be dispatched on March 2, 2026. Michele Spadaro requested the tracking number for the shipment, and Pina Saccone confirmed that the documents are expected to arrive at the Catania branch on March 11, 2026.
open_items: Provide the tracking number for PO 1231

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy is seeking L.R. Flavors & Fragrances to support their application for membership in the International Federation of Essential Oils and Aroma Trades (IFEAT) by acting as proposers. The email outlines the straightforward process involved in this request.
open_items: Awaiting response from L.R. Flavors & Fragrances regarding their willingness to support Elchemy's IFEAT membership application

thread_summaries.summary: The email thread discusses an error made by the bank regarding a SWIFT transaction. Pina Saccone from L.R. Flavours & Fragrances Industries apologized for the inconvenience and provided the relevant documentation, while Aditya Agarwal from Elchemy has involved the Accounts Team to address the issue further.
open_items: Elchemy's Accounts Team to follow up with Pina regarding the SWIFT documentation

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy is reaching out to Giovanni to discuss the opportunities arising from the recent India-EU Free Trade Agreement, which allows for duty-free access to aroma and fragrance ingredients. They aim to support Giovanni's growth in 2026 by leveraging their strengths in supply chain management and compliance.
open_items: Schedule a 15-minute introductory call to discuss opportunities related to the new FTA
